creator: jonc@chen.org.nz
text:
Created attachment 184647
update to maven-3.5.0

Update the devel/maven3 port to 3.5.0.

I personally believe that devel/maven3 port should be tracking the latest version of maven3 from maven.apache.org; similar to www/{node*} and www/{npm*} ports.

f users require the older 3.0.x version, a separate devel/maven30 port should be created.
